intro: 20 days · ~1 hour/day, following the 7-track path (Foundations → Classical ML → Deep Learning → LLMs → RAG → Agents → Cloud/MLOps → System Design). Each day ticks green as you finish its lessons. (Track 8 Extended is optional, beyond the 20-day core.)

days.note: ~1 hour. Read each lesson, poke the widgets, do the drills.
